name: Artichoke and Parmesan Dip
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons sliced scallions, white and green parts
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the artichokes, mayo, scallions (including both white and green parts), and minced garlic in a blender container.
2. Cover and blend until smooth.
3. Transfer the mixture to a medium bowl.
4. Stir in the yogurt, black pepper, and grated Parmesan cheese.
